chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-328 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case. 25.10.2019. Mr. Mansoor Ali Jatoi, advocate for petitioner. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. Mr. Manzoor Ahmed Panhwar, advocate for respondents/ Proposed accused. = The petitioner by invoking constitutional jurisdiction of this Court has prayed for issuance of direction to record his FIR as same according to him is not being recorded by SHO PS Tando Muhammad Khan under the influence of the proposed accused. No direction for recording of FIR could be issued by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction, when alternate and adequate remedy is found available to the petitioner to be exhausted by him either under Section 22-A Cr.P.C and / or under Section 200 Cr.P.C. Instant constitutional petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
